feature.control.autoEmptyStation: Some functions for the auto empty station (e.g. T8+ and T9+)
feature.control.nativeGoToPosition: Use native "goToPosition" function (e.g. OZMO T8 AIVI)
feature.control.spotAreaKeepModifiedName: Keep modified names ("spotAreaName") of the "spotAreas" channels
feature.control.spotAreaSync: Synchronize spotArea buttons in the "control" channel and also the labels
feature.control.v2commands: Use V2 Clean command for newer models (e.g. T8 and T9 series)
feature.map.mapImage: Function to load a static map ("map.[mapID].loadMapImage")
feature.map.spotAreas.cleanSpeed: Option to control clean speed separately for each spot area
feature.map.spotAreas.lastTimePresence.t: Threshold for last time presence feature (seconds)
feature.map.spotAreas.waterLevel: Option to control water level separately for each spot area
feature.map.virtualBoundariesRead: Create states for virtual boundaries and no mop zones
feature.map.virtualBoundariesWrite: Delete, save and recreate saved virtual boundaries and no mop zones
featuresWarning: Warning: Unlocking features is at your own risk. The implementation of functions varies from model to model and some functions are not available in every model
languageForSpotAreaNames: Language for spot area labels (only if labels are supported by the model)
errorLogin: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
allDevicesInfo: All devices found on your account will be managed automatically.
feature.consumable.airFreshener: Create state for Air Freshener life span component ("consumable.airFreshener")
feature.cleaninglog.downloadLastCleaning: Automatic download of the last cleaning image
feature.info.extended.hoursUntilDustBagE: Hours of cleaning time until dust bag reminder flag is set
